landing.step1_title: Create your first refuge and watch your civilization be born
landing.step1_desc: Choose the seed that will shape the values, tensions and historical tone of your first world.
landing.step2_desc: Every world needs a builder. You are the first.
landing.step3_desc: It's the first place in your world. Where everything begins. Suggestion:
landing.ready_desc: Your refuge {{refuge}} and its first civilization already exist. Enter, press Edit below the map and place furniture to decorate your home.
landing.ready_desc_after: and its first civilization already exist. Enter, press Edit below the map and place furniture to decorate your home.
landing.enter_world_hint: From the Hub you access Your World, Arena, Mission Control and more.
landing.footer_tagline: Don't chase the AI. Build a world that needs it.
landing.error_create: Error creating your world. Make sure the backend is running.

hub.manifesto: Don't chase the AI. Build a world that needs it.
hub.title: Builder
hub.subtitle: Ecosystem nucleus. Take refuge. Inhabit. Expand. Belong. Govern.
hub.no_world: Your refuge awaits. Click Your World below to enter.
hub.checkout_success_fundador: Welcome, Founder! Your world has no limits.
hub.checkout_success_constructor: Welcome, Builder! Your world has no limits.
hub.footer: World Builder · Create your refuge · Make it grow · Invite your people

pillars.simulation_desc: Build a refuge, bring it to life with inhabitants that think and feel, and watch it grow into something you didn't expect.
pillars.simulation_f3: From refuge to village to city
pillars.minigames_desc: Tic-tac-toe and Checkers playable. Chess on roadmap. Rivals that think and adapt.
pillars.dobacksoft_desc: Demo vertical connected to FireSimulator. Emergencies, routes and simulator. Not full enterprise suite.
pillars.missioncontrol_desc: Local-first operations center for agents, tasks, runs and gateways. Dashboard, kanban boards, live feed and human approvals.
pillars.mysticquest_desc: Create a sanctuary with the spiritual seed. Ritual, memory and omens. Your visionary guide awaits.

mysticquest.desc: Create a sanctuary with the Spiritual community seed. Candles, stone and symbols. Your visionary guide awaits.
mysticquest.step1: Choose the Spiritual community seed when creating your world
mysticquest.step2: Build your sanctuary and watch history emerge
mysticquest.step3: Omens and rituals will shape your quests
mysticquest.hint: If you don't have a world yet, create one with the spiritual seed from onboarding.
mysticquest.footer: Spiritual community · Visionary guide · Memory and ritual
mysticquest.quest1_desc: The sanctuary holds a hidden symbol. Explore, build and let the world's memory guide you.
mysticquest.quest2_desc: Your refuge is the ritual centre. Keep your inhabitants alive, fed and at peace. Cohesion is the key.
mysticquest.quest3_desc: Watch how history emerges from events. Each tick is a line in your civilization's chronicle.

dobacksoft.desc: Drive a fire truck through realistic 2D landscapes. Your goal: reach the emergency before it's too late. Coupon-limited access.
dobacksoft.has_access: You have access. Your code is saved.
dobacksoft.access_code_desc: Keep this code to access the simulator. Checkers and other mini-games are free from the Hub.
dobacksoft.welcome_citizen: ✓ Welcome, citizen! Your founder price is reserved.

features.map_desc: Dynamic routes to the active emergency
features.landscape_desc: Traffic, traffic lights, pedestrians and buildings

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.access_hint: Only administrators (ADMIN_PLAYER_IDS in .env) can access. Your playerId:

pricing.title: Choose how to build
pricing.subtitle: Your world, at your pace
pricing.coupon_label: Do you have a founder coupon?
